data.name: The Julius Prague
data.hotelDescription:
Luxurious Accommodation
The Julius Prague, located in the heart of Prague, offers 5-star air-conditioned rooms with modern amenities. Each room is equipped with a flat-screen TV, safety deposit box, and a coffee machine. Some rooms even feature a kitchen with a dishwasher, perfect for longer stays.

Exceptional Facilities
Guests can enjoy the convenience of a fitness centre, free WiFi, and a restaurant serving delicious meals. The hotel also provides room service, a 24-hour front desk, and private parking on site. Wake up to a delightful buffet or continental breakfast each morning.

Prime Location
Explore Prague's iconic landmarks like the National Museum and Prague Astronomical Clock, all within easy reach from the hotel. With Vaclav Havel Prague Airport just 14 km away, The Julius Prague is the perfect choice for your stay in this vibrant city.

data.name: Don Giovanni Hotel Prague - Great Hotels of The World
data.hotelDescription:
Luxurious Accommodation in Prague
Located just 3.8 km from the Historical Building of the National Museum of Prague, Don Giovanni Hotel Prague - Great Hotels of The World offers a luxurious stay with a garden, private parking, and a bar.

Exceptional Services and Amenities
Enjoy a 24-hour front desk, airport transfers, and free WiFi throughout the property. Indulge in a buffet breakfast or opt for continental or Full English/Irish options. The hotel's restaurant serves a variety of cuisines, including American, British, and Austrian, with special dietary requests accommodated.

Convenient Location and Stunning Views
Explore nearby attractions like Municipal House and O2 Arena Prague, both within 6 km. Some rooms offer breathtaking city views, ensuring a memorable stay. Book now for an unforgettable experience at Don Giovanni Hotel Prague - Great Hotels of The World.
